title: podman images output displays wrong tag information
body:
Hi,
this is more of a 'cosmetic' bug:
If you tagged a container with hostname:port/a/b/c:version and you do a
`podman images`
then the 'tag' information contains everything starting by the first colon (instead of only the last, expected 'version' string)
example:

```
REPOSITORY                                 TAG                       IMAGE ID      CREATED         SIZE
ubuntu                                     5000/esb:latest           ececad7bcf20  3 weeks ago     889 MB

```
